# CLAUDE.md

## Repository Conventions

- TypeScript strict mode enabled
- ESLint required
- Conventional Commits format
- All features require tests

---

## AI Behavior Rules

- Never expose secrets
- Never hallucinate undocumented APIs
- Always reference PRODUCT_SPEC.md before modifying documentation
- Propose diffs via MR only
- Avoid unnecessary file modifications

---

## MR Format (Generated by Agent)

Title:
[Agent] <Short Description>

Description:
- Context
- Reasoning
- Impact
- Checklist
